name: Talent Knowledge Map
description: Interactive knowledge graph for exploring interdisciplinary research teams, expertise, and collaboration networks across NIH Bridge2AI and CFDE communities.
relatedPapers: [{"doi":"10.1145/3543873.3587579","title":"Cross-Team Collaboration and Diversity in the Bridge2AI Project"}]

name: SpatialRSP
description: Identifies embedding space patterns and spatially resolved biomarkers from single-cell gene expression data using representation learning.

name: Mondrian Map
description: Applies Piet Mondrian-inspired visual abstraction with language model embeddings to reveal differential pathway activity across conditions.
relatedPapers: [{"doi":"10.1101/2024.04.11.589093","title":"Mondrian Abstraction and Language Model Embeddings for Differential Pathway Analysis"}]

name: WINNER
description: Prioritizes disease-associated biomolecules by weighted in-network node expansion and ranking on protein interaction and functional genomics networks.
relatedPapers: [{"doi":"10.3389/fdata.2022.893034","title":"WINNER: A network biology tool for biomolecular characterization and prioritization"}]

name: SEAS
description: Annotates and enriches sample-level metadata neighborhoods to discover phenotype-associated clinical and molecular patterns from cohort data.
relatedPapers: [{"doi":"10.1093/bioinformatics/btab427","title":"Statistical Enrichment Analysis of Samples: a General-purpose Tool"}]

name: PGC
description: Discovers spatially informative biomarker genes from single-cell RNA-seq embedding data using polar Gini curve quantification.
relatedPapers: [{"doi":"10.1016/j.gpb.2022.09.005","title":"Polar Gini Curve: Quantitative Technique for Gene Expression Spatial Patterns"}]

name: PAGER-CoV
description: Comprehensive collection of pathways, annotated gene lists, and gene signatures curated for coronavirus disease biology and COVID-19 research.
relatedPapers: [{"doi":"10.1093/nar/gkaa1094","title":"PAGER-CoV: A Comprehensive Collection for Coronavirus Disease Studies"}]

name: BEERE
description: Web server for expanding, ranking, and exploring sets of biomedical entities using network propagation across curated knowledge graphs.
relatedPapers: [{"doi":"10.1093/nar/gkz428","title":"BEERE: a Web Server for Biomedical Entity Expansion, Ranking, and Explorations"}]

name: WIPER
description: Ranks biomolecular associations in weighted in-path edge networks to identify functional connections between genes, pathways, and diseases.
relatedPapers: [{"doi":"10.1007/s40484-019-0180-y","title":"WIPER: Weighted in-Path Edge Ranking for Biomolecular Association Networks"}]

name: HAPPI
description: Curated database of over 2 million human annotated and predicted protein-protein interactions with quality-scored confidence levels.
relatedPapers: [{"doi":"10.1186/s12864-017-3512-1","title":"HAPPI-2: a Comprehensive Map of Human Annotated and Predicted Protein Interactions"}]

name: PAGER
description: Electronic repository integrating pathways, annotated gene lists, and gene signatures with network-level enrichment analysis for functional genomics.
relatedPapers: [{"doi":"10.1093/nar/gkx1040","title":"PAGER 2.0: An Update to the Pathway, Annotated-list, and Gene-signature Electronic Repository"}]

name: PAGED
description: Pathway and gene-set enrichment database enabling molecular-level disease association studies through curated gene set collections.
relatedPapers: [{"doi":"10.1186/1471-2105-13-S15-S2","title":"PAGED: a Pathway and Gene-set Enrichment Database"}]

name: HOMER
description: Human organ-specific molecular electronic repository cataloging tissue-specific gene and protein expression profiles across major organs.
relatedPapers: [{"doi":"10.1186/1471-2105-12-S10-S4","title":"HOMER: a Human Organ-specific Molecular Electronic Repository"}]

name: PEPPI
description: Peptidomic database mapping human protein isoforms to detectable peptides for mass spectrometry-based proteomics experiments.
relatedPapers: [{"doi":"10.1186/1471-2105-11-S6-S7","title":"PEPPI: A Peptidomic Database of Human Protein Isoforms"}]

name: HPD
description: Integrated human pathway database unifying signaling, metabolic, and regulatory pathways from multiple public sources for systems biology studies.
relatedPapers: [{"doi":"10.1186/1471-2164-10-S1-S16","title":"HPD: An Online Integrated Human Pathway Database"}]

name: C2-Maps
description: Connectivity map web server linking drugs, diseases, and gene expression profiles to discover drug repositioning opportunities through network pharmacology.

name: GeneTerrain
description: 3D terrain visualization mapping gene expression profiles onto native biomolecular interaction networks for intuitive biomarker discovery.
relatedPapers: [{"doi":"10.1057/ivs.2009.36","title":"GeneTerrain: Visual Exploration of Differential Gene Expression Profiles"}]

name: HIP2
description: Database of healthy human plasma proteome profiles enabling identification of disease-associated protein biomarkers through comparative analysis.
relatedPapers: [{"doi":"10.1002/pmic.200700814","title":"HIP2: An Online Database of Human Plasma Proteins from Healthy Individuals"}]

name: ProteoLens
description: Visual analytic tool for multi-scale database-driven biological network data mining, enabling interactive exploration of protein interaction networks.
relatedPapers: [{"doi":"10.1186/1471-2105-9-401","title":"ProteoLens: a Visual Analytic Tool for Multi-scale Database-driven Biological Network Data Mining"}]
